title: Jermaine McGillvary
description: GB & England international rugby league footballer
extract:
Jermaine McGillvary (born 16 May 1988) is an English former professional rugby league footballer who played as a winger. He spent the majority of his club career with Huddersfield in the Super League,  but also spent time on loan at Batley and Barrow in the Championship. He finished his career with Wakefield Trinity in the RFL Championship. 
At international level, he represented the England Knights, England and Great Britain.
